title: wedelia ehrenbergii
intro: Wedelia ehrenbergii, also known as the Wedelia or Flor de Lis, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Mexico and Central America. The leaves and flowers of the Wedelia ehrenbergii plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, and is also believed to have antibacterial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the Wedelia ehrenbergii plant, including teas and infusions, are commonly used to promote digestion, relieve stress, and support immune function.
